name: cpr-lifesaver-backend
description: Backend API for CPR Lifesaver chatbot

scripts.rasa:setup: cd cpr-chatbot && python3.10 -m venv rasa310_env && source rasa310_env/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install rasa==3.6.20
scripts.rasa:train: cd cpr-chatbot && source rasa310_env/bin/activate && rasa train
scripts.rasa:run: cd cpr-chatbot && source rasa310_env/bin/activate && rasa run --enable-api --cors '*' --port 5005
scripts.rasa:test: cd cpr-chatbot && source rasa310_env/bin/activate && rasa test
